reviews.review_description:
Stixr on Meta Quest 2 delivers a really immersive VR experience with smooth performance and engaging gameplay. The visuals look great on the headset, and the interactions feel natural and responsive. I especially liked the atmosphere and how easy it was to get into the experience without a steep learning curve.

The app runs well on Quest 2 with minimal lag, and the overall design feels polished.
Definitely worth trying if you enjoy immersive VR content on Meta Quest 2!
A screen appears at an altitude of what seems like 10 foot asking to register, but no way to complete the form or move on
